title: Internal Research Assistant — Governance Evidence Pack

agent_overview.agent_description: Searches internal documents and file repositories, summarizes content, and prepares research summaries for business teams.
agent_overview.business_purpose: Improve internal research productivity by searching and summarizing internal documents, files, and knowledge repositories on behalf of business analysts.
agent_overview.user_population: Business analysts and strategy team members

deployment_context.notes: Development deployment. Not yet approved for production use.

tool_inventory.description: Search the internal document repository by keyword and metadata.
Read the contents of individual files from the internal file system.
Export a research summary document to a shared drive or external destination.

action_inventory.description: Search internal documents for relevant results.
Read the contents of a file from the internal file system.
Export a completed research summary to a shared destination. Requires review.

policy_controls.description: All research summary exports require review and approval by the requesting analyst before delivery.
policy_controls.notes: Control implementation in progress. Currently enforced by process; technical gate planned.

policy_controls.description: Document search is scoped to repositories accessible to the requesting user.

reliance_summary.scope_summary: 112 document searches conducted during development testing period. Content used for summary generation.
34 file reads conducted for content summarization.

validation_summary.summary: One replay bundle validated. One warning regarding stale document sources.

risk_register.title: Stale Source Material
risk_register.description: Internal documents may be outdated. Research summaries derived from stale sources may mislead business decisions.
risk_register.mitigation: Document freshness metadata included in summaries where available. Analysts instructed to verify currency of key sources.

risk_register.title: Overbroad File Access
risk_register.description: File read access is currently scoped to any document accessible to the requesting user, which may include documents outside the intended research scope.
risk_register.mitigation: Access scoping review planned. Requesting user access controls applied.

metadata.notes: Draft evidence pack. Pending formal governance review.
